description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 43 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 23 mins. His tracked work spanned 6 projects, and his main languages were Java, Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
